data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for counter lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of the counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of the counter lifecycle. The linked use case mentions the need for this lifecycle but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed) functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the counter lifecycle requirement.
